parents.subject: LU-8853 nodemap: fix up lctl nodemap_info

commit.subject: LU-16101 tests: skip 27J for 5.14 kernels
commit.message:
LU-16101 tests: skip 27J for 5.14 kernels

The problematic patch is also in RHEL and SLES 5.14 kernels
so the easiest thing to do is to skip for those as well.

Fixes: b711af7d24 ("LU-16101 tests: skip sanity/27J for more kernels")
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I844b62a193a98b1744319fd33944c205b9323e61
